title: Process Engineer Vacancy at MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd!
